meaning: n.谷物,谷类,谷粒,细粒,颗粒,粮食
examples: Surplus grain is being sold for export.
Any shortage could push up grain prices.
The soup was a mash of grain and vegetables.
The founders of Voodoo Doughnuts never had a problem going against that grain.
By 735, no less than 149, 000, 000kg of grain was being shipped along the canal each year.
